subject: [MARIADB] Back to istanbul version of mariaDB image
commit_message:
[MARIADB] Back to istanbul version of mariaDB image

We have stability issues with MariaDB (which didn't occur on istanbul).

Issue-ID: OOM-2963
Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: I23b31db06dd87a45a47c8b2741b36e6387e5d1ec
